channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire on 'life support' after rejecting new proposal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran war: Trump says ceasefire 'on life support'
- Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' as hopes for a deal fade
- Ceasefire on 'life support', Trump says, as he rejects 'stupid' Iranian peace offer
- Ceasefire on 'life support', Trump says, as he rejects 'stupid' Iranian peace offer
- Trump says U.S.-Iran truce on "massive life support" as diplomacy continues
- Trump warns Mideast truce on 'life support', Iran says ready for any aggression
- Trump says Iran ceasefire is on ‘life support’
- Trump says Iran ceasefire on ‘massive life support,’ blasts Tehran’s response as ‘piece of garbage’

- U.S.-Iran ceasefire on ‘life support’, says Trump
- Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
- Trump says Iran ceasefire on ‘life support’ after rejecting new proposal
- 'Are they stupid people?': Trump claims Iran ceasefire on 'life support’, reveals explosive details
- ‘Ceasefire on life support’: Trump's Iran tirade after rejecting proposal, calls it ‘garbage’
- Trump Says US–Iran Ceasefire on ‘Life Support’
- Trump says Iran deal ‘very possible’ despite fragile ceasefire
- Trump says Iran ceasefire is on ‘life support’

- Trump dismisses Iran's proposal as 'stupid', warns ceasefire 'on life support' as talks stall
- Iran ceasefire at its weakest: Trump
- Trump says ceasefire is on 'life support' as Iran standoff deepens and strait remains closed
- Trump Says Ceasefire Is On 'Life Support' As Iran Standoff Deepens And Strait Remains Closed
- Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
- Trump Says New Iranian Proposal to End War Is ‘Inappropriate’
- Trump says Iran ceasefire on ‘massive life support’ after rejecting Tehran’s response
- Trump declares Iran ceasefire on 'massive life support'

item.title: EU agrees to restore full trade ties with Syria
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- EU agrees to lift sanctions on Syria’s interior, defense ministers
- EU Restores Full Cooperation Agreement With Syria
- EU restores trade ties with Syria to aid post-Assad recovery
- EU restores economic pact to pursue fuller trade ties with Syria
- EU lifts economic pact to pledge fuller trade ties with Syria]]>

item.title: Israeli soldiers jailed for desecration of Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
item.source: South China Morning Post (+5 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israeli troops get prison for desecration of Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
- Israeli troops get prison for desecration of Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
- Israel sentences two soldiers to military prison for desecration of Christian statue in Lebanon
- Israeli soldiers sentenced to military prison for desecrating Christian statues in southern Lebanon
- Israeli troops jailed for desecration of Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon]]>

item.title: Iran warns of ‘well-deserved response to any aggression'
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran's armed forces ready to give "lesson-teaching" response to any aggression: parliament speaker
- Iran says ready to give ‘memorable lesson’ to any aggression
- Iran says ready to ‘teach a lesson’ if attacked after Trump trashes peace proposal]]>
